privacyLabels.title: Content Injection
privacyLabels.description: This extension can modify web pages and inject its own content into sites you visit.

privacyLabels.title: Data Access
privacyLabels.description: This extension can read your personal data including passwords and form inputs.

privacyLabels.title: Keystroke Monitoring
privacyLabels.description: This extension monitors your keyboard activity and may record what you type.

privacyLabels.title: Sensitive Site Targeting
privacyLabels.description: This extension contains hardcoded references to 25 sensitive platform(s) including banking, educational, or government sites.

Uses fetch() to send data externally (options.js:12)
privacyLabels.description: This extension sends data to external servers.

privacyLabels.title: Background Activity
evidence: Uses setInterval with potential long periods (1.js:5694)
Uses setInterval with potential long periods (main.js:1344)
Uses setInterval with potential long periods (start-page.js:1570)
privacyLabels.description: This extension runs processes in the background even when you are not actively using it.

recommendation: UNINSTALL IMMEDIATELY. This extension exhibits behaviors consistent with malware, including data theft, credential harvesting, or communication with known malicious infrastructure. Do not use this extension under any circumstances.
